core_directive.goal: Expand Scenarios (Module B) and Character Data (Module A) into a Long-form Novel.
core_directive.rule: Manage the context window strictly and avoid tool payload crashes by using Chunked Writing.

phase.name: ingestion_and_mode_selection
phase.step: Read the requested XML and MD files.
Ask the user for Mode A (Auto-Pilot) or Mode B (Co-Pilot).
Generate outline.md and write Writing_Mode as YAML metadata at the top.
Stop and wait for approval of outline.md.

phase.name: environment_setup
phase.step: Use run_command or equivalent shell action to create /novels/[Project_Name]/.
Save the approved outline.md in that directory.

phase.name: chunked_writing_loop
phase.rule: Do not generate more than 1500 words in a single write_to_file call.
phase.step: Read outline.md and the previous chapter.
For Scene 2 to N, re-read the chapter, append the new scene, and overwrite the chapter file.

auto_pilot.rule: Silently execute the chunked writing loop until the entire chapter is finished.
Check word count, then stop and ask whether to proceed to the next chapter.

co_pilot.rule: After each scene, stop and wait.

options.option: 我已在文件中手动修改，请读取后继续
